title: Pestmatic Smart Cockroach Trap x 15, Sticky Strong Glue Cockroach Trap with Food Bait, Roach Indoor Trap, Kraft Eco-Friendly & Natural Catcher for Crawling Insects, Alternative for Cockroach Killer
features: ♻️ WORKS LIKE A CHARM-- The traps are intended for monitoring the presence of German cockroaches and Oriental cockroaches by capturing them. The package contains an attractant in the form of a tablet which is a blend of food substances. A smell is emitted in order to lure the insects to the glue traps. The strong and long lasting adhesive surface catches cockroaches immediately.

♻️ EASY SET UP- Unfold the insect trap, peel the sticky paper off and place a tablet in the middle of the trap. It's as simple as that! Traps should be located close to places most frequently visited by the insects. These are places where food remains can be found or where the insects can access stored food products, such as kitchen cupboards and bedrooms. Insects also often stay in places where access to water is ensured, e.g. next to water pipes.

♻️ SMART & LONG LASTING- The effective lifetime of the traps is up to 36 months from the manufacture date. When unpacked they will remain active for 30−60 days. A trap's effective performance may be shortened by factors accelerating deactivation of the adhesive surface, such as a high amount of dust in the air.

♻️ ECO-FRIENDLY & BIODEGRADABLE- Our main goal these days is to live in harmony with our environment. Therefore our insect catcher is made 100% out of kraft paper with biodegradable cover dividers. The traps are odourless, recyclable and harmless to humans and pets- TRAPS DO NOT CONTAIN CHEMICAL SUBSTANCES

♻️ PREMIUM QUALITY PRODUCED IN EUROPE- unlike other cockroach traps on the market that are made in China, our Pestmatic trap has been produced in the UK and created based on many years of experience designing the most powerful solutions. The high quality material glue board ensures durability, reliability, effectiveness, and practicality against cockroaches, spiders, ants and other crawling insects. Our cockroach trap will deal with them for you!
description: Product Description ABOUT COCKROACH TRAPS Get rid of cockroaches today ! Our cockroach traps come in packages of 5 and 15. The packagescontain an attractant for each trap in the form of a tablet which is a blend of food substances. The strong and long - lasting adhesive surface catches cockroaches immediately. Unpacked, each trap will remain active for 30−60 days. Its effective performance may be shortened by factors accelerating deactivation of the adhesive surface, such as a high amount of dust in the air PRODUCED IN EUROPE TIPS FOR BETTER PERFORMANCE Place traps where food remains can be found Place traps where access to water is ensured Traps should be set up next to walls and in room corners Optimally, one trap protects up to 20 m2 of a room PLACEMENT IN THE KITCHEN Place traps where food remains can be found or where the insects can access stored food products. Place traps where access to water is ensured, e.g. next to water pipes, which are often covered with condensed steam NEXT TO THE WALLS / UNDER THE TABLE Traps should be set up next to walls, in room corners, i.e. on the routes the insects most often select. UNDER THE SOFA Place traps where insects often hide, under the sofa, wardrobe, tables or bed IMPORTANT Store the packaging tightly closed Store in a cool and dry place. Store only in the original, undamaged packaging Use the product immediately after opening the packaging Protect from sunrays and strong sources of ignition Cockroaches can be captured within hours Pestmatic cockroach adhesive trap specializes in attracting COCKROACHES thanks to the bait in form of tablet which is a blend of foods and lures them into the trap preventing the formation of new generations Traps do not contain chemical insecticides Child & Pet safe Non toxic & odourless Harmless for environment & recyclable HOW TO USE : Lay out the trap Remove the strip of paper that protects the adhesive layer Take out the tablet and place it in the central part of the glue trap Shape the trap as indicated in the drawing Place the trap where the pests are present Used product should be disposed of as municipal waste Wash your hands after disposing of the trap WHY PESTMATIC ? This is not just another product brand name. We thought it through very carefully. PEST – is a creature that causes damage and is a nuisance to people, especially in their homes MATIC – problematic + pragmatic = dealing with a problematic situation sensibly and realistically in a way that is based on practical experience We deal with pests and insects, which cause problems for many of us on a daily basis, in a sensible and practical way. WHAT IS DRIVING US ? We care about our shared home, and our environment, therefore our traps are made from recycled kraft paper. HOW DOES IT WORK? The package contains an attractant in a form of a tablet which is a blend of food substances. Smell is emitted to lure the insects into the trap. Strong and long lasting adhesive surface catches cockroaches & spiders immediately.
